text:
First, note: US/Mountain is UTC-7 (assuming standard time, no DST in January). Asia/Kolkata is UTC+5:30.  
Time zone difference: (UTC+5:30) − (UTC-7) = 12 hours 30 minutes ahead.  

5:00 AM Mountain + 12 hours 30 minutes = 5:30 PM same day (January 16, 1186).  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1186-01-16 17:30
